advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance and strength. Your recent sessions indicate a good mix of running and weight training.
advice.focus: Incorporate more easy aerobic runs to enhance your endurance while maintaining strength training.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of about 8-10 km at a comfortable pace to recover and build aerobic capacity.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during workouts to avoid overtraining, especially after high-intensity sessions.
